problem id: ef2fe526
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) AND SHL(1)

examples:
  10011100 -> 00001000
  11000111 -> 00001100
  01101011 -> 10010110
  10010110 -> 00101000
  11000100 -> 00001000
  10000101 -> 00001000
  11110110 -> 01101100
  10000011 -> 00000000
  11011101 -> 10011000

query: 10101101
predicted answer: 01011010
